form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start ran on from midfield and won by 1.5 m as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr6) held up early, at Swan Hill (2:45.60) beating Bet On Aces in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $2.60 at the bell was 3rd-4.8. Aided by the draw so may play a role.

form.formComment: Last start game effort when 3rd (Sr3) over 1680m at Terang beaten 8 m by Morris Brown (1:59.60) in NR up to 55 on March 27 at $2.70. Two runs back won by a nose (Fr3) at Geelong (1:54.70) beating The Art Of Success in NR up to 55 on March 13 at $2.50 at the bell was leading 1.26. May prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a clear run until approaching 200m.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 7th (Fr4) over 2170m at Cobram well beaten by Lilly Lotus (2:37.50) in NR 52 to 60 on April 25 at $19. Prefer later in the prep.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 7th (Fr4) over 2170m at Cobram well beaten by Lilly Lotus (2:37.50) in NR 52 to 60 on April 25 at $19. Prefer later in the prep.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: The right rein becoming undone in the latter stages of the score up.
Broke gait free of interference after the start and trailed the field.
Pulled hard during the score up.
Over raced throughout the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr4) over 1720m at Melton, at the bell was 5th-9.74 beaten 9 m by Popcornfriday (2:01.90) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $71. Two runs back 5th (Sr2) over 1650m at this track was 7th-10.54 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Maas Betting Again (1:57.40) in NR 52 to 56 on March 18 at $11. This looks a tough task.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly during the early stages of the score up.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 7th (Fr3) over 2250m after showing early speed and racing wide at Boort, beaten 40 m by Lewielewis (2:48.20) in NR 56 to 64 on March 1 at $10.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 7th (Fr3) over 2250m after showing early speed and racing wide at Boort, beaten 40 m by Lewielewis (2:48.20) in NR 56 to 64 on March 1 at $10.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Sulky contacted entering the first turn when Roll To The Top hung outwards.

form.formComment: Ran well last start showing plenty of improvement following March 1 run. Just managed to hang on and win won by a nose as favourite when quickly away, (Fr3) at Ararat (2:10.30) beating Village Voice in NR 45 to 50 on March 23 at $2.40 at the bell was leading 1.7.

form.formComment: Has won at his last two outings. Last start won by 1.3 m (Sr1) at this track (2:00.30) beating Shazza Love in NR 50 to 55 on April 1 at $5. Hard to leave out on current form. Among the exotic chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has won at his last two outings. Last start won by 1.3 m (Sr1) at this track (2:00.30) beating Shazza Love in NR 50 to 55 on April 1 at $5. Hard to leave out on current form. Among the exotic chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Came from midfield and won by a head (Fr1) at Birchip (2:38.00) beating Golden Tribe in 4yo+ NR up to 90 on March 8 at $6 at the bell was 3rd-3.7. Two runs back won by 30 m as favourite (Sr3) at Mildura (2:39.50) beating Calf Pen in NR 45 to 50 on February 25 at $1.60 at the bell was leading 12. Rates highly. Tougher draw but winning form is hard to knock.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Paced roughly around the first turn.
Held up for clear running on the final turn.
Tired to be beaten 62.8m into eighth placing.

form.formComment: Last start by 1.0 m (Sr1) at Swan Hill (2:06.10) beating Random Mahoney in NR 45 to 50 on March 31 at $6 at the bell was 6th-8.8. In form and looks a first-four player again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilised the sprint lane in the home straight.
Raced roughly at various stages of the event.
Inconvenienced at the 700m by Random Mahoney.
